title: Xtra Creamy Vietnamese Ground Beef Noodles
description: A salty and creamy Vietnamese dish featuring ground beef and mirepoix-base, suitable for kids and diabetic-friendly, this recipe is a delicious and healthy option for the whole family.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat and cook the ground beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the diced onion, grated carrot, and diced celery to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the fish sauce, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds if desired.
